subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken unto My call from the direction of the Prison, then remember thy Lord at eventide and at dawn. Leave thou what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی اسمعی ندائی عن شطر السجن ثم اذکری ربک فی العشی و الاشراق دعی ما
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @living waters; water of life, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment
